response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture or leadership in distributed systems, and their C++ exposure appears limited to academic or early-career projects.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead and ship complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent infra)
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
No demonstrated technical leadership in mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning cloud architecture
